emails.subject: REQUEST FOR TIME OFF.
emails.body: REQUEST FOR TIME OFF. I AM REQUESTING FOR THIS TIME OFF, DEC.20TH DEC.21ST, DEC.22ND. MY FAMILY AND I ARE PLANNING A TRIP TO HUNTSVILLE.

emails.subject: Re: REQUEST FOR TIME OFF.
emails.body: Re: REQUEST FOR TIME OFF. Those days off are fine. See if you can get the calendar and put your days on it. I know that sounds backwards since you could have done it before, but this way we can all get into the habit of emailing, getting a response and then putting it on the calendar. Sorry for the confusion. Brenna Judy Hernandez@ECT 11/21/2000 03:11 PM
